title: The Mad Wizard's Grimoire
description: Language file resourcepack library providing default translation strings for all of my datapacks
body:
## The Mad Wizard's Grimoire

The Mad Wizard's Grimoire is a resourcepack library that provides default translation strings for all of my datapacks. This resource pack is not required to utilize my datapacks and is intended as a means for non-english-speaking users to be able to translate keys used in my packs into their own language.

**Current languages included**
- en_us

### Future Plans
This pack will be eventually expanded to include default item models for items created in my datapacks; as they are written to utilize custom model data to provide visual enhancements or overrides to the default vanilla item models. This allows players to use my datapacks without requiring this resourcepack.
